name: @cs2helper/cs2sharp-server-plugin
description: CounterStrikeSharp (C#) server plugin for CS2 — build output in dist/ for deployment to addons/counterstrikesharp/plugins.

scripts.build: dotnet publish Cs2SharpServerPlugin.csproj -c Release -o dist --nologo -v minimal
scripts.clean: dotnet clean Cs2SharpServerPlugin.csproj -c Release --nologo -v q && rimraf dist bin obj
